evidence: `src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:219-224` now preserves the adapter-returned `envelope.metadata.backend_used` and `envelope.metadata.model_used` instead of rewriting them from the resolved target, so downstream persistence sees the actual invocation metadata.

Invocation-backed workflow persistence sites now build `RecordProducer::Agent` from envelope metadata: `src/contexts/workflow_composition/completion.rs:138-141`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/prompt_review.rs:111-114` and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/prompt_review.rs:170-173`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:239-242`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:351-354`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:443-446`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:559-562`, and the generic path in `src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs:4647-4650`.

The panel supporting-record helpers copy that producer into the persisted `ArtifactRecord` itself, not just the in-memory payload: `src/contexts/workflow_composition/completion.rs:332-340`, `src/contexts/workflow_composition/prompt_review.rs:379-386`, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:946-953`.

`src/adapters/fs.rs:1105-1106` serializes `ArtifactRecord` with `serde_json::to_string_pretty` and performs no producer-field transformation, so `producer.backend_family` and `producer.model_id` are written through to `history/artifacts/*.json`.

Regression coverage exists at two levels: `src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:402-437` asserts the service preserves adapter-reported backend/model metadata, and `src/contexts/workflow_composition/final_review.rs:1513-1605` asserts persisted artifact JSON records `codex` / `actual-model-from-envelope` rather than the configured `claude` / `configured-*` target values.
findings_or_gaps: No acceptance defect was identified in static review, but executable validation is incomplete because `cargo`, `rustc`, and `rustfmt` are not installed in this environment.

End-to-end persisted-artifact coverage is explicit for the final-review path; completion and prompt-review rely on the same producer-to-artifact pattern and static inspection here rather than an executed acceptance test in this environment.
follow_up_or_amendments: Run `cargo test invoke_preserves_adapter_reported_backend_and_model_metadata persisted_artifacts_use_envelope_metadata_not_resolved_target` and `cargo check` once the Rust toolchain is available.
If broader acceptance coverage is desired, add executed artifact-persistence regressions for the completion and prompt-review panel paths as well.
